seoTitle: Spearwood vs Spencers Brook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Spearwood and Spencers Brook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Spearwood vs Spencers Brook: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Spearwood and Spencers Brook.
heading: Spearwood vs Spencers Brook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Spearwood, Western Australia and Spencers Brook, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Spearwood has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Spencers Brook (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Spearwood or Spencers Brook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Spearwood has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Spencers Brook scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Spearwood scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Spencers Brook scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Spearwood or Spencers Brook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Spearwood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
